comment.body:
Clarification please on weekly post re JPM collar and VIX: you said: 
It has however a strong effect on vol of vol, capping any downward vol upstick. So, once the collar expires, the local short vanna, long vomma profile decreases, making downside support weaker.” 
You mean downside support for equities / risk right, not VIX/vol?
